case_title: HONORIO JUAN VS. RONEET ALICIA BENEISHAI et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUAN, HONORIO AS TO DEFENDANT BENEISHAI, RONEET ALICIA DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-28-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-26-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-31-2002
MAY 28,2002 POS OSC IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BEFORE HEARING BY THE COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
STATUS CONFERENCE OF JUN-28-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF.
